text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I'm walking around the academy, Symboli
Rudolf spots me and approaches.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Ah, perfect timing. I was just hoping to speak with
you.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
A matter has arisen that requires the student
council's attention. It seems we need all hands on
deck.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Would you mind if I missed today's training
session to attend to it?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I shall ensure that it is dealt with by the end of
the day, so future sessions should be unaffected—

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hold it right there, bucko!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Teio?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: You need a hand, right? Well, I've got two!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I appreciate your enthusiasm, but this is a matter
for the student council.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: C'mooon, I just wanna help out!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I won't mess around! I pinky swear!
choice_data_list: Many hands make light work, right?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. I should be enough to make up the
difference.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
No way! Awww, so much for Operation Get
Praised...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Fine, you win! But next time, I won't take no for
an answer!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I am flattered enough that you asked.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Teio.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Urgh...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, I'm needed in the student council office.
I'll see you tomorrow, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
True to her word, Symboli Rudolf attends to her
duties with lightning speed. By the end of the
day, she has finished everything.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yeah, exactly! See? It's a great idea!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Just think about it! The harder I work, the quicker
you can get back to training!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I have to say, I did not foresee my own trainer
taking Teio's side.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Very well, then. But I expect you to follow my
instructions to the letter.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yahoo! You got it, Prez! To the letter!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yeaaah, I'm gonna be rolling in compliments! ♪

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Well then, if you'll excuse us, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! ♪ I'm Prez's little helper! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, Symboli Rudolf manages to clear her
student council workload by the end of the day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is thanks in no small part to Tokai Teio
following instructions carefully, lightening the
load on Symboli Rudolf's shoulders.
